The PW IOI Edge

What we do differently to get students hired

Foundation Pillars that turn Classroom Learnings into Internship offers.

Industry-Integrated Curriculum

Students work on real-world problems from day one through an industry-relevant curriculum, integrated with Microsoft and Apple-enabled learning - designed to replace outdated, theory-heavy college learning.

Mentorship & a Strong Hiring Network

A dedicated placement cell that delivers 1:1 coaching, interview prep and continuous support from the first year - backed by an extensive hiring network of top companies that opens access to opportunities across tech, product and emerging domains in the industry.

Placement Highlight
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Have doubts about placements? We’ve answered the common ones.

Yes. Our placement cell connects you with companies, helps you secure internships, and guides you through every step of the interview process while you build a strong professional network. 89% of the SOT Class of 2023 secured internships by their second year.

Internship exposure begins from the first year. The curriculum is built around real-world projects from day one, so students are interview-ready and earning stipends well before their final year - some as early as the first semester.

For the SOT ’23 batch, the highest stipend was ₹50,000/month, the top 10% averaged ₹40,000, the top 25% averaged ₹35,000, and the batch average was ₹24,000. Some students earned up to ₹2.5 lakhs in total internship earnings.

Students have interned and been placed across Physics Wallah, Allo Health, Ikshan AI, Cognizant, ICICI Bank, upGrad, K12 Techno and more, with industry partnerships including AWS, Deloitte and Microsoft.
